steps: Log in or create a free Shippo account at https://goshippo.com
In the API Configuration section, click 'Generate Token' or 'Create new live key'
For development and testing, use 'Create new test key' instead
Copy the API token immediately — it is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Shippo API token, sent as 'ShippoToken <token>' in the Authorization header

notes: Free tier available with limited label purchases; paid plans unlock volume discounts
Live tokens start with 'shippo_live_'; test tokens start with 'shippo_test_'
Test tokens allow you to simulate shipments without real carrier charges
The API token is shown only once — store it securely
Token must be sent with the 'ShippoToken' prefix, not 'Bearer'

test_endpoint.description: List addresses to verify the API token is valid
